form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start won by a neck at Funabashi March 12 over 1800m defeating Laulea with 54kg at $6.70. form.formComment: Entire back from a spell of nine weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. form.formComment: Comes here off a 34-day let-up. Most recently raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 12 at this track on March 6 over 2000m, 3 len behind Crow Song with 57kg at $16.30. The start before that crossed from a wide gate to settle just off the pace but gave ground when 5th of 14 at this track on February 3 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Tenderly carrying 56kg at $47.80. Progressing well and a win is on the cards.
